---
name: Create Biome config via CLI
description: User prefers Biome config to be generated via biome init CLI command rather than manually writing the file
type: feedback
---

Create biome.json via `bunx biome init` CLI command instead of manually writing the file.

**Why:** User prefers the canonical config generated by the tool itself.

**How to apply:** When setting up Biome, always run `bunx biome init` first, then customize the generated config as needed.
